payload.message:
Generate an end-of-day reflection using the trackyr-activity skill. Run these queries:
1. --mode today (daily summary)
2. --mode focus (focus sessions)
3. --mode productivity (productivity score)
4. --mode context-switches (context switching analysis)

Summarize my day in 3-4 bullet points: what I focused on, how productive I was, and one suggestion for tomorrow. Keep it brief and actionable.
